title: satureja parnassica subsp. athoa
intro: Satureja parnassica subsp. athoa is a subspecies of the mountain savory plant, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Satureja parnassica subsp. athoa include alleviating digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and acting as an antispasmodic to soothe muscle cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
